Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}According to the records, the accumulated mass of Shadows split into several large ones that later dispersed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}These are the Shadows we've been encountering on nights when the moon is full.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Maybe... that's why it's difficult to predict where they'll appear?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}If what you said is true, then why did our school turn into Tartarus?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Is it because that's where they conducted the experiment!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Then those students who were hospitalized...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It was a highly populated area, and the Kirijo Group had influence there. They could essentially do as they pleased.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Port Island must have been the perfect location for them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}So yes, as you guessed, the experiment ten years ago was conducted at Gekkoukan High School.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Just what are you trying to say here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}So that's the whole purpose behind SEES?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We were dragged into all this just to clean up their mess!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}And you knew too, didn't you, Sanada-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}You've both just been using us![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Or do you not care, as long as you're the one who gets to do the fighting?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I never said anything like that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Think what you'd like, but it was my decision not to share the information.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It was never my intent to deceive you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Convincing you to join SEES was my highest priority.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I know it may not be fair, but Shadows can only be defeated by Persona-users. We are the only ones who can fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I never had a choice either... It didn't matter if I wanted this power or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Takeba-kun, it's only those in the past who are to blame.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}And they lost their lives as a result of what they did.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}We're all in the same boat, here. None of us deserve the burden that's been thrust upon us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}It's been ten years since the incident in question. No one knows why those Shadows suddenly returned.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}But now that they're here, we have the chance to find and destroy them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Do you realize what that means?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}What if I told you that the twelve Shadows are the cause of everything?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}You're saying if we defeat them all, Tartarus and the Dark Hour will disappear?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}That's what I was going to tell you earlier. See, it's good news, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}There's evidence to support it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}And this is where our true battle begins.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Regardless of what's happened in the past, we must fight to protect the people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}The Shadows are gaining strength. We can't afford to wait for them to strike first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}And there are still many mysteries surrounding Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}For instance, why did such a gigantic structure appear in the first place? The answers must be out there somewhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We must defeat the twelve[n]Shadows that started all of this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...In order to eradicate both[n]the Dark Hour and Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I must fight to protect everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Six of them remain...[n]{f 1 1}
